scripts.test:e2e:character-creation:finalization: playwright test e2e/character-creation-smoke.spec.ts --grep "mustering finalization|seeded multi-career|finalization controls|same-seed finalized"
scripts.test:e2e:character-creation:mobile: playwright test e2e/character-creation-smoke.spec.ts --grep "usable at phone width"
scripts.test:e2e:character-creation:repeat: playwright test e2e/character-creation-smoke.spec.ts --grep "repeat-runs disposable seeded travellers"
scripts.test:e2e:character-creation:reveal: playwright test e2e/character-creation-smoke.spec.ts --grep "without early reveal|hidden until reveal|reload and join a term skill roll"
scripts.verify:quick: npm run build:client && npm run lint && npm run check:docs && npm run check:boundaries && npm run check
scripts.verify:full: npm run verify:quick && npm test && npm run test:e2e:character-creation && npm run test:e2e:tactical
scripts.list:salvage: find data src/shared/schemas docs legacy -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort
